target: PATAGIUM-CONF (inline confidence-interval companion tokens at decode + downstream verifier interval matching)

results.title: Wallace's flying frog — Wikipedia
results.note: Source-domain biology; not an LLM technique.

results.title: UQ + Confidence Calibration Survey (2025/3)
results.note: Broad UQ/calibration survey; overlaps confidence theme but not inline interval companion tokens specifically.

results.title: ConfTuner verbal confidence (NeurIPS 2025)
results.note: RL-trained verbalized confidence; close to verbalized confidence aspect, lacks explicit interval companion-token decode.

results.title: LLM-as-Judge Interval (EMNLP 2025)
results.note: Interval-based uncertainty for LLM judges; matches verifier interval-matching aspect.

results.title: Empirical Evaluation of Confidence Elicitation (OpenReview)
results.note: Prompting/sampling/aggregation confidence elicitation; partial overlap, no companion-token mechanism.

results.title: Inline Confidence-Interval Token Decoding (2026/3)
results.note: Direct match: emits prediction + confidence-interval companion tokens inline at decode — core mechanism of PATAGIUM-CONF.

results.title: Companion-Token Calibration of LLM Outputs (2025/10)
results.note: Companion tokens encoding output confidence — directly matches companion-token aspect; lacks explicit interval framing.

results.title: Interval-Verified Generation for LLMs (2026/4)
results.note: Downstream verifier matches generation against confidence interval — direct match for verifier interval-matching aspect.

novelty_rationale: Ranks 6, 7, and 8 collectively cover the full PATAGIUM-CONF mechanism — inline confidence-interval token decoding (rank 6), companion-token output calibration (rank 7), and downstream verifier interval matching (rank 8). Rank 6 alone is near-identical (func 0.93). Multiple high-func hits (>=0.85) confirm prior art convergence; ranks 3-5 provide additional adjacent support.
decision: REJECT — proposal lacks meaningful novelty beyond existing inline confidence-interval companion-token + interval-verifier literature.
